title: Ave Maris Stella Medieval
description: Big Fabric Modpack focused on medieval themed additions
body:
# Ave Maris Stella – A Medieval Catholic RPG Experience

![Knight staring in the distance with sword and crusader shield](https://i.postimg.cc/jSzMVQTV/Minecraft-Screenshot-2025-10-16-16-16-38-01.png)

Step into Ave Maris Stella, a medieval-themed Minecraft modpack inspired by the faith and beauty of Christendom. Explore vast lands filled with castles, cathedrals and dungeons.

![Medieval Cathedral](https://i.postimg.cc/wjhwKczp/Minecraft-Screenshot-2025-10-16-16-27-07-30.png)

Style your historic set of medieval armour and weapons.

![Knight staring in the distance with two handed sword](https://i.postimg.cc/kgxTrFCd/Minecraft-Screenshot-2025-10-16-16-17-44-86.png)

Engage in RPG-style progression with quests, skills, and mystical abilities. Build in authentic medieval style with hundreds of new blocks and decorations, and experience an immersive world shaped by faith, chivalry, and divine wonder.

![Dragon](https://i.postimg.cc/9fCJcRXj/Minecraft-Screenshot-2025-10-16-16-21-23-94.png)

![Medieval Scenery](https://i.postimg.cc/CxjcyH0p/Minecraft-Screenshot-2025-10-16-16-17-20-02.png)
